case_title: FANNY REYES VS. ALBERT F. MENDOZA

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUL-27-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-29-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-12-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF FANNY REYES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 12/07/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, FANNY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

DECLARATION OF FANNY REYES RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, FANNY
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM HEARING SET FOR OCT-12-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY REYES, FANNY AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, ALBERT F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 7/27/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. THIS MATTER HAS ALREADY BEEN CONTINUED TO 12/7/18 @ 3:30PM. THIS ENTRY IS TO ADDRESS THE ERRONEOUS CALENDARED TIME OF 8:30AM. THE ORDER FILED 7/27/18 INDICATED MATTER WAS SET FOR 3:30PM.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 10-15-18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
